title: UX Research Toolkit — Emotions Layer
description: Layer schema extending each phase with an emotional state. Merge into each phase object alongside the core phase definition. Patch applied to each phase object to add emotional data.

emotion.description: The dominant emotional state the persona experiences during this phase

emoji.description: Single emoji representing the emotion visually

label.description: Short emotion name in the language of the document

level.description: Emotional valence on a 1-5 scale. 1 = very negative/distressed, 3 = neutral, 5 = very positive/delighted. Used to plot the emotion curve.
